name: Agent Browser
description: Browser automation for search, navigation, extraction, and submission tasks.
install_hint: Install the browser automation skill from the OpenClaw skill marketplace.

name: Skill Search
description: Discover and inspect installable OpenClaw skills.
install_hint: Use the platform skill discovery feature or install from ClawHub.

name: File Manager
description: Create, move, read, search, and summarize local files.
install_hint: Provide filesystem permissions or install the file operations skill.

name: Cron Scheduler
description: Schedule recurring tasks and reminders.
install_hint: Install the scheduler skill and configure the notification channel.

name: Email Agent
description: Send, read, filter, and summarize emails.
install_hint: Install the email skill and configure SMTP and IMAP credentials.

name: Baidu Baike
description: Fetch structured encyclopedic entries from Baidu Baike.
install_hint: Install the Baidu Baike skill from the marketplace.

name: AI Story Generator
description: Generate story-style or illustrated narrative content.
install_hint: Install the storytelling or generative content skill.

name: Seedance Video
description: Generate short videos from prompts or scripts.
install_hint: Install the video generation skill and configure the API token if required.

name: Stock Analysis
description: Analyze a stock using fundamentals, technicals, and market context.
install_hint: Install the stock analysis skill and connect a market data source if needed.

name: Framework Iterator
description: Refine research frameworks through iterative prompts and structured feedback.
install_hint: Register a local framework iteration skill or prompt workflow.

name: PDF Reader
description: Extract text and structure from PDF documents.
install_hint: Use the document extraction skill or OpenClaw native PDF support.

name: DOCX Writer
description: Generate structured Word reports.
install_hint: Install a document authoring skill capable of writing DOCX files.

name: Canvas Design
description: Lay out charts, cards, and visual content on a canvas.
install_hint: Install the canvas or slide design skill.

name: PPTX Generator
description: Generate editable slide decks.
install_hint: Install the presentation generation skill.

name: Stock Watcher
description: Track live or delayed stock data and summarize market movement.
install_hint: Install the stock watcher skill and configure a data provider.

name: News Aggregator
description: Collect, deduplicate, and summarize news by topic or watchlist.
install_hint: Install a news aggregation skill and connect the delivery channel if needed.

name: Web Scraper
description: Extract structured content from web pages and tables.
install_hint: Install the web scraping skill with browser permissions enabled.

name: XLSX Writer
description: Generate spreadsheets for tabular outputs and metrics.
install_hint: Install a spreadsheet skill that writes XLSX artifacts.

name: Technical Analyst
description: Analyze chart structures, indicators, and trading signals.
install_hint: Install the technical analysis skill and connect market data if needed.

name: Email Parser
description: Parse resumes or structured documents from incoming email content.
install_hint: Register a local parser skill or email parsing workflow.

name: Deep Research
description: Perform multi-step deep research on a topic and synthesize findings.
install_hint: Install the deep research skill with browser/search access.

name: Consultant Deck
description: Produce consulting-style research decks and narratives.
install_hint: Register a local consultant-deck skill or combine deep research with PPT generation.

name: 10jqka API
description: Access Tonghuashun market and announcement data.
install_hint: Configure the 10jqka client, credentials, and API wrapper.

name: RQData API
description: Access RiceQuant data for research and backtests.
install_hint: Configure the RQData SDK and account credentials.

name: Wind API
description: Access Wind financial data and research endpoints.
install_hint: Configure the Wind terminal or WindPy client and permissions.

name: Strategy Builder
description: Build and document quant or discretionary stock selection strategies.
install_hint: Register a local strategy builder workflow with backtest support.

name: Pattern Recognition
description: Detect chart patterns and build pattern-based strategies.
install_hint: Register a local pattern recognition workflow with chart inputs.

name: Announcement Aggregator
description: Track and summarize listed-company announcements on a schedule.
install_hint: Combine a market data skill with scheduler and delivery skills.

name: Stock Research Assistant
description: Coordinate financial statement reading, market context, and memo writing for a stock.
install_hint: Combine stock analysis, documents, and browser skills into a unified assistant.

name: Market Monitor
description: Monitor the market during trading hours and generate alerts and recap notes.
install_hint: Register a monitoring workflow with quote data and a delivery channel.

name: Database Updater
description: Refresh structured research datasets on a recurring basis.
install_hint: Register a database update workflow with a scheduler and source connectors.

name: Factor Mining
description: Mine candidate factors, test them, and evaluate robustness.
install_hint: Register a local factor-mining workflow with backtest and evaluation support.

name: Report Reproduction
description: Reproduce the structure and reasoning of a sell-side report from source data.
install_hint: Register a workflow that combines data extraction, modeling, and report writing.

name: Code Engineering
description: Implement complex research code, validate outputs, and package artifacts.
install_hint: Register a local engineering workflow with repository access and tests.
